caption: The video depicts a group of individuals in military uniforms traversing a rural, grassy landscape under an overcast sky. In the initial scenes, a person in tan camouflage pants and boots walks across a log lying on the ground, while others are visible in the distant background. The person in the foreground carries equipment, including what appears to be a handheld device. As the scene progresses, the focus shifts to other soldiers in camouflage gear moving through a wooded area near a dirt path. One individual is seen from behind, wearing a helmet and carrying a rifle. The text "Hero Ukraine" is visible in the upper-left corner of several frames, and a red and white logo containing the number "13" appears in the upper-right corner throughout the clip.
